name: Slide2Video
tagline: Turn any slide deck into a fully narrated video in minutes.
description:
Slide2Video converts PDF or PPTX presentations into narrated videos automatically. Upload your slides, and the AI generates a script from the content, lets you review and edit it, then synthesizes a voiceover and builds the final video with synchronized timing. No video editing skills or recording equipment needed.

It's aimed at founders, educators, and marketers who want to repurpose existing presentations as shareable video content. The tool launched in April 2026 and is currently free to use.
features: Accepts PDF and PPTX file formats up to 50MB
AI-generated narration script from slide content
Script review and editing before export
AI voiceover synthesis with automatic timing
pros: Fully free at launch  - no paywall or watermark
Supports both PDF and PPTX input formats
cons: Very new product  - pricing model may change post-beta
Limited voice customization compared to dedicated TTS tools
No information yet on export resolution or watermark policy at scale
bestFor: Founders turning presentations into shareable video
keyStrength: Zero-effort PDF/PPTX to narrated video conversion
